title: Calling for Help 打急救电话
scene: Ben发现爷爷突然不舒服，打电话求助。

lines.en: Hello? I need help! My grandpa fell down!
lines.zh: 你好？我需要帮助！我爷爷摔倒了！

lines.en: Calm down, sweetie. Where are you?
lines.zh: 别着急，小朋友。你在哪里？

lines.en: I am at home. The address is twenty-three Apple Street.
lines.zh: 我在家。地址是苹果街23号。

lines.en: Is your grandpa awake? Can he talk?
lines.zh: 你爷爷清醒吗？他能说话吗？

lines.en: He is awake but he says his leg hurts a lot.
OK. Do not move him. An ambulance is on the way.
lines.zh: 好的。不要移动他。救护车已经在路上了。

lines.en: About ten minutes. Stay on the phone with me.
lines.zh: 大约十分钟。别挂电话，陪我说说话。

lines.en: OK. I put a blanket on him to keep him warm.
lines.zh: 好的。我给他盖了毯子保暖。

lines.en: You are very brave. The ambulance is almost here.
lines.zh: 你很勇敢。救护车快到了。
